title: glaphyropteris rupicola
intro: Glaphyropteris rupicola, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Cyatheaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Glaphyropteris rupicola include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Glaphyropteris rupicola is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices for its medicinal uses.
